name: io.github.clipia-ai/clipia-mcp
title: Clipia
description: Generate AI images, video, speech and music from Claude, ChatGPT and Cursor via remote MCP.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Clipia API key from the Developer Console (https://clipia.ai/en/developer). Format: 'Bearer clipia_...'. The endpoint also supports OAuth 2.1 (PKCE) for claude.ai and ChatGPT — no key needed there.
